data.title: Comsysto Reply Supports Audi in Evolving Its B2B Used Car Platform With an AI-Based Multi-Agent System
data.description: In Turin, Italy, Comsysto Reply, a company within the Reply Group focusing on agile software development and cloud-native solutions, has teamed up with Audi to enhance its "Used Car Platform." This platform serves as Audi's main digital marketplace for B2B trading of used cars. Through a customized multi-agent solution, the partnership aims to speed up software development, minimize redundant tasks, and facilitate swift introduction of new functionalities. The "Used Car Platform" stands as a crucial digital sales avenue for Audi’s pre-owned vehicles.

data.title: Swiss Firms Seek Managed Security as AI Risks Rise
data.description: Recently, a growing number of Swiss companies are seeking assistance from cybersecurity providers due to the increasing threat of AI-driven attacks, making it challenging to maintain adequate protection in-house, according to ISG. This trend underscores the escalating concern over safeguarding against cyber threats in Switzerland.

data.title: LG InstaView™ REFRIGERATOR SURPASSES 5.3 MILLION IN GLOBAL SALES
data.description: Celebrating its 10th anniversary since the 2016 launch, LG Electronics' InstaView™ refrigerator has surpassed a remarkable milestone of over 5.3 million units sold globally. This innovative appliance has been widely recognized and chosen by customers around the world as it continues to redefine the kitchen experience.

The yen carry game is changing but more slowly than expected. Something that worked for 30 years does not unwind quickly. Algorithmic dominance also extends the timeline. Markets no longer react to narratives the way they did 10 to 15 years ago. Stories develop gradually until flow changes.

data.title: Beko Publishes 2025 Integrated Report, Charting Years of Progress Toward Net Zero
data.description: Beko has recently published its 2025 Integrated Report, marking its third consecutive appearance on TIME's global sustainability ranking. The company has maintained its top ranking within its industry. The report highlights the significant progress made by Beko. The announcement was made in Istanbul on July 24, 2026.

data.title: PhotonPay Releases Emerging Markets Payment Report: Unlocking Africa's B2B Potential Through Multi-Rail Architecture
data.description: Recent studies have underscored the role of stablecoins and unified multi-rail settlement infrastructure in connecting Africa's swift domestic digital advancements with the disjointed global commercial trade sector. The research, conducted in Hong Kong on July 24, 2026, emphasized the significance of these technologies in promoting financial stability and efficiency. PhotonPay, a cutting-edge financial services provider, was specifically mentioned in the study for its contributions to this field. This indicates a growing trend towards embracing innovative solutions in the region, with the potential to enhance connectivity and economic growth.

data.title: Two Peking University alumni awarded Fields Medals, 14 PKUers speak at the 2026 ICM
data.description: On July 23, 2026, the 2026 International Congress of Mathematicians began in Philadelphia, USA. Peking University alumni Wang Hong and Deng Yu were honored with the 2026 Fields Medals, a top recognition in mathematics.

data.title: Zoomlion Strengthens Global Customer Support During Challenging Summer Conditions
data.description: On July 24, 2026 in Changsha, China, Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science & Technology Co., Ltd. has been providing assistance to customers with their engineering cranes and construction hoisting machinery. The service teams, operating across various product lines, have been dedicated to supporting clients.

data.title: Valmet's Half Year Financial Review January-June 2026 Net sales and Comparable EBITA increased in the second quarter
data.description: Valmet Oyj issued a stock exchange announcement on July 24, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. EEST in ESPOO, Finland. In the April-June 2026 period, orders received by the company saw a 10 percent decline to EUR 1,373 million, down from EUR 1,520 million. The organic decrease in orders received was 9 percent. data.title: Temu partners with the Schweizerischer KMU Verband to help Swiss businesses sell online
data.description: A recent collaboration has been formed to provide Swiss small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) with a pathway to access Temu's marketplace, along with valuable assistance in transitioning to the digital realm. This initiative, announced on July 24, 2026, in HÜNENBERG, Switzerland, aims to support local businesses in establishing an online presence. Through this partnership, SMEs in Switzerland stand to benefit from gaining entry to a global e-commerce platform, facilitating their online sales efforts.
